body.title: gh auth token expiry detection — CC commit skill + Igor habit
body.result: Added gh auth check to commit skill Step 0a (halts with clear message if token expired). Created tools/git_auth_check.py with check_gh_auth() tool. Seeded PROC_GIT_AUTH_CHECK habit (trigger: git push|push origin|commit and push) via seed_git_auth_check_habit.py. All 1684 tests pass.
body.description: Detect gh auth token expiry before git push fails. (1) CC commit skill Step 0: run 'gh auth status' and halt with clear message if token invalid. (2) Igor habit PROC_GIT_AUTH_CHECK: fire on git_push intent, run gh auth status, warn if invalid. Background: gh token expired silently mid-session 2026-04-04 — push prompted for password which fails with 2FA.
